title: Agent Architectures
description: Core architectural patterns from ReAct to workflow agents and how to choose between them

lessons.title: The Architecture Landscape
lessons.description: Why architecture matters and a taxonomy of agent design patterns

lessons.title: ReAct: Reasoning + Acting
lessons.description: The ReAct loop — interleaving thought, action, and observation

lessons.title: Plan-and-Execute Agents
lessons.description: Planning upfront, then executing step-by-step with dynamic replanning

lessons.title: Self-Reflection and Critique
lessons.description: Agents that evaluate their own output and self-correct before responding

lessons.title: Routing and Handoffs
lessons.description: Classifying inputs and delegating to specialized sub-agents or workflows

lessons.title: Workflow and State Machine Agents
lessons.description: Deterministic control flow with LLM-powered decision nodes

lessons.title: Choosing the Right Architecture
lessons.description: Decision framework: matching agent patterns to problem characteristics
